network_summary: Dr. Lawrence A. White DDS is a Chicago south-side dentist who personally owns and operates two GP dental offices under his independent brand 'Comfort Dental Studio' — Hyde Park (1370 E 53rd St, 60615, opened 1989) and Pilsen (1253 W 18th St, 60608, opened ~1992). No DSO, MSO, management company, or PE affiliation exists. The NPPES dso_national / affiliated_dso='Comfort Dental' tag on the Hyde Park location is a classifier false-positive: 'Comfort Dental Studio' is Dr. White's own private brand, unrelated to the Colorado-headquartered Comfort Dental franchise chain. Both offices share the same phone number (773-731-3300) and website (comfortteeth.com). Dr. White's bio cites ADA, ISDS, and Chicago Dental Society leadership roles consistent with an independent dentist-owner. Associates (Dr. Steven Steiner, Dr. Gunmeet Maini) work in the practice but Dr. White is the founder/owner.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Lawrence A. White DDS, founder and owner; opened first office 1992 near childhood home on Chicago south side; ADA/ISDS/Chicago Dental Society member/leader
durable_artifacts: Both locations share identical phone number 773-731-3300

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Location 659a2d2d736f5059 (1370 E 53rd St, 60615) carries entity_classification='dso_national' and affiliated_dso='Comfort Dental' — this is a CLASSIFIER FALSE POSITIVE. 'Comfort Dental Studio' is Dr. White's independent private brand; it is not affiliated with the Colorado-headquartered Comfort Dental franchise/DSO. White DDS. (2) LinkedIn profile confirms 'Lawrence White - Owner, Comfort Dental Studio - Hyde Park, Pilsen.' (3) Dr. White's bio states he opened his first practice in 1992 near his childhood home on Chicago's south side. (4) No DSO, MSO, management company, or PE affiliation found anywhere on the website or in any search result. (5) 'Comfort Dental' DSO affiliation tag confirmed false-positive: national Comfort Dental franchise has no Chicago presence at this address per search.
future_app_notes: 1) Recommend demoting location 659a2d2d736f5059 from dso_national/affiliated_dso='Comfort Dental' to small_group — it is Dr. White's private Hyde Park office with 3 providers. 2) This network is a clean dentist_multi confirmation; no further validation needed for tier. 3) Watch for any future DSO acquisition if Dr. White approaches retirement (practice founded 1989, ~35+ years). 4) The shared phone and brand across two ZIPs make this a strong positive signal for the dentist_multi tier but the evidence is conclusive enough for ready_for_validation.
